verses.text: Topa' khutsungah kumpipa om a, lo sunga tuilak bangin a deihna peuhah hei kawikawi thei hi
Na gamtatna khempeuh nangmah in man na sak hangin Topa in na lungsim tawng a ettelna phawk in
Topa in biakpiakna sangin thuman thutang deihzaw hi
Kihisakin gamtatna leh kiphatsakna lungsimte pen mawhna hi a, migilo hihna lim ahi hi
Limtakin ngaihsunin geelgeelna pen hauhna lampi hi a, nawhsa-in lopthop hihna pen zawn'na lampi ahi hi
Zuaugenna tawh hauhnate beimang pak a, sihna khuk sung hong tun'pih hi
Migilote a manin gamta nuamlo uh ahih manin amau' gamtatsiatna mah a awkpih uh hi
Mimawhte thukawi-in gamta uh a, midikte a manin gamta uh hi
Phun bek a thei zi tawh innsungah ten'khop sangin innkhumzang kiu khatah tangten' hoihzaw tham hi
Migilote in thusia bekbek deih uh a, a lawmte nangawn zah tuanlo uh hi
Mi kiphasakte gim a kipiak ciangin mi mawkmawkte in pillawh uh a, mipilte a kihilh ciangin thutheihna-in nei uh hi
Pasian in migilopa' innsungah a kisem khempeuh mu tel a, migilote lawnthalin a siasak hi
Mizawngte' huh ngetna a pia nuamlote pen amau zong cimawhin huhna a nget uh ciangin kipialo ding hi
A simthamin letsong piakna in hehna damsak a, puannuai tawi in sinsona daisak hi
Thutangin na a kisep ciangin midik khempeuh lungdam a, ahi zongin migilote lungkham hi
A kilawm gamtatna pan a pialkhia mite misi honte lakah a tung hi
A noptat nuamte zawng uh a, zu ne-in sathau namtui a nilhte haulo uh hi
Midikte' thuak dingin a bawlsak uh gimnate pen migilote mah in lehthuak zawsop uh hi
A phun hat zi gilo tawh ten'khop sangin gam simthamah khat guak tangten' hoihzaw hi
Mipilpa' innsungah neihlelam a dimin om a, ahi zongin mihaipa in a ngahzahzah zangkhia pah hi
Thuman thutakin gamta tawntung lecin na khan' sau-in pahtawina na ngah ding hi
Mipil khat in mi thahatte in a hut khuapi lazo a, amau' muan'muan' kulhpi nangawn susiazo hi
Kampau a ki-ipzote lungkhamna tawh kipelh hi
Mi kihisak i cihte pen kilian sakin a kiphasak mite ahi hi
Mi thadahpa in na sem nuamlo ahih manin amahmah a kithattawm ahi hi
Mihoihlote in lungkim hun neiloin deih thuah tawntung uh a, mihoihte cingh-in piakhia tawntung uh hi
Topa in migilote' biakpiaknate deihlo a, ngimna hoihlo tawh a piakte uh deihlo zaw kan lai hi
A manlo tecite mangthang ding uh a, thuman tecite' kam kizaza ding hi
Migilote pen muan'theih dingin khauh pau uh a, midikte ahih leh lungmuang takin kampau hiathiat uh hi
Mihingte' pilna, a thutheihna leh a thugente khempeuh, Topa' deihna tawh a kituah kei leh a kiman'na omlo hi
Galdona dingin sakolte a baihsa-in kikoih a, ahi zongin galzawhna pen Topa' hang hizaw hi.
